mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND withdraw_at IS NULL )

SELECT s.store_id, s.image_url, s.business_name, o.business_number, s.is_battery_supported AS battery_supported FROM stores s INNER JOIN owners o ON s.owner_id = o.owner_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.withdraw_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations ( user_id, store_id, addr_base, addr_detail, event_start_date, event_end_date, headcount, is_power_available, request_memo, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{addrBase}, #{addrDetail}, #{eventStartDate}, #{eventEndDate}, #{headcount}, #{powerAvailable}, #{requestMemo}, #{status} )
